name: Delete all Valhalla-imported rules from the Sekoia Rules Catalog
description: Deletes every rule the sync trigger created. Default mode: filters by the marker tag `valhalla-integration` that the sync trigger attaches to every rule (robust across API-key rotations). Advanced mode: clear `marker_tag` and configure `match_field`+`match_value` to filter by any top-level field — useful for cleaning up rules that predate the marker tag. Never touches user-created rules or Sekoia's verified catalog. Defaults to dry-run — set `confirm=true` for deletions to actually run.

confirm.title: Confirm deletion
confirm.description: Must be true for rules to actually be deleted. When false, the trigger emits a report of what WOULD be deleted and makes no DELETE calls.

marker_tag.title: Marker tag
marker_tag.description: Deletes every rule whose `tags` list contains a tag with this name. The sync trigger attaches `valhalla-integration` to every rule it POSTs. Leave empty to disable tag mode and use `match_field`/`match_value` instead.

match_field.title: Field to filter on (advanced, tag-mode disabled)
match_field.description: Only used when `marker_tag` is empty. Top-level rule field to match against. Default `created_by` (the UUID of the API key that created the rule).

match_value.title: Value the field must equal (advanced, tag-mode disabled)
match_value.description: Only used when `marker_tag` is empty. When both are empty, the trigger runs in diagnostic mode and logs the top values observed in the tenant.

frequency.title: Re-run frequency in seconds
frequency.description: How often to re-check the catalog for anything left to delete. Once the tenant is clean this is a no-op. Default 24h.
